creator: dog@virtual.org.ua
text:
Oh, I'm extremely sorry!
I stopped using this software some times ago and should've closed this PR.
Recently I tried to build the port and it found that everything is alright
now.
So, please, close the port.


2013/6/19 Stefan Walter <stefan@freebsd.org>

> Hi Pavlo,
>
> there hasn't been any activity with your problem report (see [1]) for a
> while, and editors/tea has been updated multiple times in the meantime.
> Are you still seeing the problem you described, or should this PR be
> closed?
>
> Best regards,
> Stefan
>
> [1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/174553
>
